text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking back to the academy with Manhattan
Cafe, when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stops in her tracks, and I follow her gaze to
see a gardening store.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Um... Would it be okay if we had a look in there?
choice_data_list: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I try to remember whether she's always had
an interest in gardening, the two of us step inside
the shop.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After comparing several brands of fertilizer,
Manhattan Cafe leaves with a few bags in hand.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Good thing they had the fertilizer I was looking
for.
choice_data_list: Are you growing something?
Are you growing something?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'm growing a coffee plant in the dorm...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Once it bears fruit, I'll be able to harvest the
cherries...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The seeds inside those cherries are where coffee
beans come from...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like the perfect plant for a coffee lover
like her, and I can tell she's excited by the way
she's talking about it.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It takes around... three years for it to bear fruit.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And you can only harvest the cherries once a
year...
choice_data_list: It must be a very precious plant, then.
It must be a very precious plant, then.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That's why the roast I make with those beans...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Will make for a very special, one-of-a-kind
drink...
choice_data_list: Sounds like something to look forward to.
Sounds like something to look forward to.

It's impressive how you're doing this all from
scratch.

It's impressive how you're doing this all from
scratch.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Will make for a very special, one-of-a-kind
drink...
choice_data_list: Sounds like something to look forward to.
Sounds like something to look forward to.

It's impressive how you're doing this all from
scratch.

It's impressive how you're doing this all from
scratch.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'm just a hobbyist, though... I can't say if they'll
taste any better than store-bought beans...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But there's a certain flavor... that can't be
described in terms of deliciousness alone...
choice_data_list: That's the perk of growing your own beans.
That's the perk of growing your own beans.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Perhaps... if...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe mumbles something, but it's too
quiet to hear.
choice_data_list: What's that?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Nothing.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The voices... There are a lot of them now... I think
it's time to head back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm curious to know what she said, but it wouldn't
be polite to press her. Ending the conversation
there, we return to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Not really...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Some of my plants don't make the winter... or
they get leaf scorch... or pests get to them...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I've tried growing plants many times, only to fail...
choice_data_list: But you haven't given up.
But you haven't given up.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...No, I haven't.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The struggle... makes the harvest that much more
rewarding...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Because I get to savor coffee that's all my own...
choice_data_list:
I hope you'll be able to harvest the plants this
time, too.

I hope you'll be able to harvest the plants this
time, too.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Perhaps... if...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe mumbles something, but it's too
quiet to hear.
choice_data_list: What's that?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Nothing.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The voices... There are a lot of them now... I think
it's time to head back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm curious to know what she said, but it wouldn't
be polite to press her. Ending the conversation
there, we return to the academy.
